dashboard.title: Brand Semantic Website OS
dashboard.subtitle: SaaS Platform for AEO & AI Search Answer Optimization
dashboard.seed_desc: Populate local DB with stable seed data representing our three MVP domains (PureBarrier, Quick25, Lumiere Hall).
dashboard.kbeauty_desc: Trust-focused claims and YMYL sensitive skincare AI answer trace loop.
dashboard.convenience_desc: Menu combo locator and local-business intent mapping trace loop.
dashboard.wedding_desc: Complex packaging contract integrity and wedding vendor comparison trace loop.
dashboard.guardrails_desc1_text: Every data item generated in this lab is strictly tagged with workspace_id. PostgreSQL Row-Level Security ensures that even high-performance query tools cannot leak tenant boundaries.
dashboard.guardrails_desc2_text: Your active role is owner. Mutative actions (such as publishing brand truths or creating patches) will verify role permission matrices using backend-validated session signatures.

observatory.title: AI Answer Observatory
observatory.subtitle: Real-time AI search answer visibility and metric analytics

kculture.studio_subtitle: A MeaningOps module that extracts cultural concept tensors based on TCO, evaluates global resonance, and uncovers commercial, tourism, and creative transfer opportunities.
kculture.harness_desc: Evaluates the AI response space in real-time using a 6-dimensional judgment pipeline (extraction, fidelity, distortion, hallucination, risk, policy) against the standard QBS question set of the selected domain pack.
kculture.opps_empty: Run observations to let the Opportunity Engine automatically generate K-Content, K-Tourism, and K-Product opportunities.
kculture.active_check_desc: Load the 3 national standard domain packs (K-Beauty, K-Food, K-Tourism) and 90+ canonical cultural concepts to begin your analysis.

attractor.title: Cultural Attractor Map
attractor.subtitle: Force-directed visualization of the loaded K-Culture concept network
